title: Procurement Of Consultancy Services To Develop A Comprehensive Business Continuity Management Systems In Line With Iso 22301 For The Financial Services Authority.
description: Posted in Expression of Interest . The Seychelles Financial Services Authority (“FSA”) is seeking the services of a qualified and experienced Consultancy Firms either locally or internationally to develop a comprehensive Business Continuity Management System (“BCMS”). The main objective of the Consultancy Services is to develop a comprehensive and fully operational BCMS in line with ISO 22301 for the FSA. The BCMS should provide a structured framework to ensure continuity of the Authority’s critical functions during disruptions, strengthen its Organizational resilience and align its business continuity practices taking into account the national framework, stakeholder relationships and international best practices. The Chairman Procurement Review Panel P.O. Box  313, Room 105 Care House Building Victoria, Mahé P: (248) 4 382 000 Sylvie Gopal (Mrs) Secretary secretaryrp@pou.gov.sc

title: SPA - Invitation For Prequalification
description: Posted in Expression of Interest . The Seychelles Port Authority (SPA) intends to construct a new deck on pile structure, approximately 310m long, together with the associated revetment, reclamation and back of quay paving works and services on the south-east of the existing quays at the Commercial Port in Port Victoria. The berth pocket and navigational area are to be deepened in order to meet the functional requirements of the new quay. The scope also includes for the provision of one breasting and one mooring dolphin to facilitate the mooring of tanker vessels as well as the provision of the necessary culverts and servitude works to accommodate the relocation of the existing fuel import pipeline, import cement line and connections to be undertaken by others. The expected duration of the contract is 24 months. Prospective applicants willing to participate in the project must demonstrate suitable experience in design, construction, testing and commissioning of marine structural and civil infrastructure and in particular, the execution of piled marine structures, dredging, reclamation and coastal engineering works. The deadline for submission of prequalification documents is Friday 12th April 2024. The Chairman Procurement Review Panel P.O. Box  313, Room 105 Care House Building Victoria, Mahé P: (248) 4 382 000 Sylvie Gopal (Mrs) Secretary secretaryrp@pou.gov.sc
